_readme: Persistent memory for the amazon-grocery-shopper skill. Keys are lowercase ingredient names (as they appear in shopping-list.json exports from the meal planner). Each confirmed product is remembered so future runs reuse the same brand/size instead of re-searching. Never edited by the website itself — only by the shopping agent.

preferences.priceStrategy: cheapest reasonable option, prefer store brand (e.g. Amazon Basics/365/Happy Belly) when available
preferences.notes: Avoid warehouse-club / multi-pack sizes unless that is the only option available for an item.
